title: posit::conf(2024)
text:
posit::conf came to Seattle!

The Big Data in R with Arrow introductory workshop on arrow package was a lot of fun. Can’t wait to try out some of what we learned at work.
I also heard people talk about and show lots of cool, inspiring things that you can do with Quarto. I still remember how impressed I was back in 2015 when I first discovered R Markdown. But it’s 2024, time to move on and learn Quarto. So, here we go…
